qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_horario as ID, t.c_horario as CODE, t.d_horario as TEXT, t.d_tipohorario as tipo, SEC.policy FROM TTA02_HORARIOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Horarios.HORARIO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_horario LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.oi_horario={#SOURCE:helper-mess/@ID} AND t.l_cambio_turno =\'1\' ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_horario as ID, t.c_horario as CODE, t.d_horario as TEXT, t.d_tipohorario as tipo, SEC.policy FROM TTA02_HORARIOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Horarios.HORARIO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_horario LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.c_horario={substring_before(#INDOC:@CODE,\'-\')} AND t.l_cambio_turno =\'1\' ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW

qry:select.name: RS1
qry:select.qry:xquery: for $r in sql(' SELECT t.oi_horario as ID, t.c_horario as CODE, t.d_horario as TEXT, t.d_tipohorario as tipo, SEC.policy FROM TTA02_HORARIOS as t, NMD_SECURITY(class=\'NucleusRH.Base.Tiempos_Trabajados.Horarios.HORARIO\') as SEC JOIN t.oi_horario LEFT OUTER SEC.id WHERE t.l_cambio_turno =\'1\' ORDER BY CODE asc ')/ROWS/ROW
